caption: A man with glasses and a distinctive, tall, silver-colored pointed hairstyle is recorded in a podcast studio. He is wearing a white shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders, with large black headphones over his ears. He is speaking into a professional black microphone on a stand. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on display. An on-screen logo features a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY" followed by "PODCAST" and a website address. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, with slight changes in his facial expressions and head position. He remains centered in the frame throughout, maintaining his posture while engaging in conversation.
